birthday.name: Sunny Birthday Ambassador
birthday.reason: Most celebratory birthday framing; Spanish birthday copy fits the Signia employee use case.

birthdayAlternate.name: Joy Birthday Ambassador
birthdayAlternate.reason: Warm, younger, high-smile birthday pose for lighter celebrations.

sports.name: Brave Sports Ambassador
sports.reason: Soccer action pose and energetic body language match Mundial activations.

winter.name: Hope Winter Ambassador
winter.reason: Husky and blue-toned institutional styling make the strongest winter signal.

maintenance.name: Hope Maintenance Ambassador
maintenance.reason: Calm, composed, trust-building pose for operational notices.

newYear.name: Sunny New Year Ambassador
newYear.reason: Open, cheerful pose works well alongside fireworks without competing with them.
